description_long: This is a pair of well-worn athletic sneakers, primarily off-white in color with visible dirt and scuff marks throughout the uppers and midsoles. The shoes feature a standard lace-up design with white laces, and the tongues are slightly protruding and creased. The midsoles are thick and cushioned, showing signs of discoloration and use, while the outsoles are only partially visible but appear to be made of durable rubber. The shoes have a low-cut profile, padded collars, and reinforced toe caps, all of which display significant wear and grime. The overall appearance suggests these shoes have been used extensively in outdoor urban environments, resulting in a rugged, distressed look.
description: A pair of heavily worn, off-white athletic sneakers with visible dirt, scuffs, and standard white laces. The shoes have thick, cushioned soles and a low-cut, padded design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, scuffed toe caps, loosely tied white laces, and slightly protruding tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, discolored midsole, side panel stitching, and overall dirt accumulation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel collars, heel counter details, and visible wear on the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible scuff marks, side stitching, and worn midsole.
